Roberta Boldea is a destination wedding bridal makeup artist specializing in soft glam, polished luxury beauty for brides. Based in Barcelona, she provides camera-ready makeup services across Spain and Europe, with expertise in long-wear formulas designed to withstand heat and humidity.
